_comment: Visa/status definitions (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.20 V1). Runtime state machine lives in game/visas.ts (VisaMachine) — this file is definitions only, hot-reloaded like every other data/*.json (defs may change live; runtime VisaMachine state is preserved, see VisaMachine.retune). `durationDays: null` = permanent (never expires). `losable` + `graceDays` = on expiry the sim gets a grace window before game over instead of an immediate one (job-loss style statuses). `obtainedVia` describes how a NON-start status is granted: 'quest' via the new grantVisa reward type, 'application' via the phone (V2, not built yet) — the start status (tuning.visa.startStatus) has neither, so the field is optional. `requirements` (quest condition namespace) only matters for 'application' statuses — checked by the V2 phone UI before calling VisaMachine.apply(); V1 ships the data + the pure apply()/pending-resolve logic, no UI.
